memory.summary: My academic plan is interrupted by a social invite from my close friend group, creating a conflict I must resolve directly.
I've officially informed cohort_3 about my sleep debt and library status. This direct communication aligns with my assertive approach to managing the social-academic conflict.
Cohort_3 is already ordering without me; my direct boundary-setting worked, but their enthusiasm confirms the social pressure remains high.
Two hours of focused work yielded a 0.18 progress jump, but my energy is dropping as the social pressure from cohort_3 lingers.
I gained 0.11 progress in the analysis section, yet with less than an hour remaining and energy critically low, I must prioritize finishing this task immediately.

My analysis score of 0.83 confirms the task is nearly complete, but I must renegotiate the deadline with prof_assignment immediately to secure credit without further social pressure.

goals.description: Execute the analysis section submission by 18:00, ensuring technical completeness to avoid any appearance of unreliability to cohort_3 while securing formal credit before sleep debt degrades cognitive function.
goals.rationale: My value weights prioritize academic outcomes (0.5), and I cannot afford the penalty of a failed outcome or the social fallout of appearing unreliable to my trusted peer group (cohort_3). The recent message to them creates an immediate obligation to deliver; waiting until 20:00 would be irrational given my current energy state and the hard deadline at 18:00. I will finalize this now to reclaim mental bandwidth.

goals.description: Terminate the renegotiation with prof_assignment immediately after submission to reclaim mental bandwidth for the reading deadline, explicitly stating that the extension request was contingent on the submission's quality rather than a desire to delay work indefinitely.
goals.rationale: While assertiveness is a core trait, it must serve the long-term planning horizon. Spending more time negotiating after I have already secured the credit (or risked the grade) is inefficient. My focus capacity is currently depleted by the high-stakes nature of g1; I will defer this interaction until post-submission processing to ensure the negotiation itself does not become a distraction from the actual learning (reading).

goals.rationale: Direct confrontation is required to protect my schedule and avoid passive avoidance; this preserves trust while ensuring I don't accumulate more sleep debt.
